title: Drink 8 glasses of water today
flavour: hydration speedrun. your body is running on 2%. fix it.

title: Take a 20-minute walk outside — no headphones, no phone
flavour: skill: noticing things. xp gained: whatever is around you right now.

title: Go to bed before midnight tonight
flavour: your sleep schedule is a war crime. declare a ceasefire.

title: Do 10 minutes of stretching
flavour: your hamstrings are filing a complaint. this is the resolution.

title: Eat a proper breakfast — not just coffee
flavour: your brain is booting on fumes. load the fuel first.

title: Take the stairs instead of the elevator all day
flavour: the elevator is a crutch. the stairs are a character arc.

title: Do 20 minutes of movement — anything counts
flavour: dancing in your room counts. the body doesn't care if it's embarrassing.

title: Spend 20 minutes outside — just exist in it
flavour: sun detected. processing... processing... recommend exposure.

title: Eat one meal with no screens
flavour: food deserves your full attention. taste it. what does it taste like?

title: Take a proper nap (20–30 mins) if you're tired
flavour: sleep debt is real debt. this is a partial payment. take it.
